calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-03-2005 Continued To Aug-08-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-08-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trina Ayala.
Arnold Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff: Arlington Hotel Limited Partners.
Plaintiff's witness: Tammie Hook, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: John Cruikshank.
Exhibit 1 - Three-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 480 Ellis St., #425, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,097.20
Costs $151.30
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE: ARNOLD EVJE COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF ARLINGTON HOTEL LTD. PARTNER
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOHN CRUIKSHANK

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED COURT TRIAL

COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN CLERK RENE A. PASCUAL NOT REPORTED. 218.
